name: Roanoke Payday Loans
description_short: ACE Cash Express in Roanoke offers check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and installment loans at their Valley View Blvd location with extended hours and multiple financial services.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates a physical location on Valley View Boulevard in Roanoke, Virginia, providing a range of financial services beyond traditional payday lending. The company functions as a multi-service financial hub offering check cashing, money transfers via MoneyGram, bill payment services, and money orders alongside lending products. Their Roanoke location is open Monday-Thursday and Saturday 9:00 AM-7:00 PM, Friday 10:00 AM-7:00 PM, making it accessible during extended business hours for customers who cannot visit during typical bank hours.

The company's primary service offerings include check cashing (no bank account required with valid ID), installment loans ranging from $100-$1,000 with longer repayment terms than payday loans, and money transfer services to over 200 countries and territories. They also provide bill payment for rent, utilities, and credit cards, tax refund check cashing, ATM services, and prepaid card products (Porte, Flare Account, and ACE Elite Visa). Business check cashing is available for small business owners.

ACE Cash Express distinguishes itself through its comprehensive financial services model rather than focusing solely on payday lending. The company offers prepaid banking products with mobile app functionality and in-person support, positioning itself as a full-service alternative financial institution. Their location-based model provides face-to-face customer service and immediate cash access, differentiating them from purely online lenders.

While ACE provides legitimate financial services, the primary focus remains on short-term lending and fee-based services that serve unbanked or underbanked consumers. Like most alternative financial services, installment loans and other offerings may carry fees or interest rates higher than traditional banking products. The company's value proposition depends on the consumer's specific need—check cashing and money transfers are straightforward services, while installment loans should be evaluated carefully against the total cost of borrowing.
pros: Extended hours including Friday 10 AM opening and Saturday 9 AM-6 PM availability
Installment loans offer longer repayment terms and equal payment amounts versus payday loans
Check cashing available without bank account requirement—only valid government ID needed
MoneyGram money transfers to 200+ countries and territories
Multiple prepaid card and banking account options (Porte, Flare, ACE Elite) with mobile apps
One-location convenience for check cashing, bill pay, money orders, and lending
Tax refund check cashing and tax card cash withdrawal services
cons: No specific APR, fees, or loan terms disclosed on the location page—pricing information unavailable
Installment loans capped at $1,000, insufficient for larger financial emergencies
Fee-based services (check cashing, money transfers, bill pay) add costs compared to traditional banking
Physical location required for most services; no online lending application capability mentioned
Sunday hours unavailable—completely closed on Sundays, limiting weekend access
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals needing check cashing without a bank account
Small business owners who need to cash business checks and access bill payment services
Consumers sending international money transfers via MoneyGram to specific countries
Individuals seeking installment loans with flexible repayment over payday loan alternatives
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express Roanoke is best for unbanked consumers and small business owners who need immediate check cashing, money transfers, or bill payment without a traditional bank account. The main caveat is that while check cashing and money services are straightforward, installment loans should be compared carefully against total borrowing costs, and specific loan terms and APRs are not disclosed on their location page.
services: Check cashing (all types including tax refunds)
Porte prepaid account with mobile banking app
ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card
Tax refund check cashing and tax card withdrawals
